name: GoRascal
description_short: GoRascal is a mortgage lender offering home purchase and refinance loans with rate comparison tools, pre-qualification, and 24/7 customer support across 49 states.
description_long:
GoRascal positions itself as a modern mortgage lender focused on simplifying the home loan process. The company was founded with the mission to make mortgage hunting "as easy and personal as it should be," differentiating itself through technology-enabled rate shopping and transparent communication throughout the lending journey.

GoRascal offers mortgage services for both home purchases and refinancing. Core services include free rate quotes with no credit impact, pre-qualification assessments, rate comparison tools, rate lock-in options, and full loan processing through underwriting and closing. The company maintains an NMLS license (#2072896) and operates across 49 states, employing multiple loan officers with individual NMLS certifications. They feature a rate alert subscription service that notifies customers when mortgage rates drop, positioning this as a competitive advantage for rate-conscious borrowers.

The company distinguishes itself through several operational features: 24/7 availability, an emphasis on transparent communication at each process step, no hidden costs or required upfront documents for initial quotes, and a specialized team of mortgage professionals available for personalized guidance. They highlight customer reviews (4.9 stars with 350+ and 440+ reviews across categories) and maintain a structured six-step process from pre-qualification through closing. Their headquarters in Brooklyn, NY and toll-free support suggest a regional or national operation with accessible customer service.

While GoRascal presents itself as customer-friendly with strong ratings, potential borrowers should note that the website contains disclaimer language stating all rates are "subject to change and dependent on borrower approval, creditworthiness, and lender terms." The company's loan officer directory indicates ongoing updates, and customers are directed to NMLS Consumer Access for verification. As with all mortgage lenders, actual rates and terms will vary significantly based on individual financial profiles, credit scores, and market conditions.
address: 185 Wythe Ave Suite A2, Brooklyn, NY 11249

company_info.headquarters: 185 Wythe Ave Suite A2, Brooklyn, NY 11249

pros: Licensed in 49 states with NMLS #2072896 and individual loan officer NMLS certifications
24/7 customer support availability with dedicated loan officers for personalized service
Free rate quotes with no credit score impact and no documents required initially
Rate alert subscription service notifying customers of rate drops automatically
Transparent six-step process with clear communication at each stage
No hidden costs stated upfront for rate quotes and pre-qualification
Strong customer ratings (4.9 stars with 350-440+ reviews)
cons: Website shows incomplete loan officer directory with note that not all officers are currently listed
Rates displayed are examples only and heavily subject to borrower creditworthiness and approval
No disclosure of specific loan products, terms, or whether they offer FHA/VA/jumbo mortgages
Website in active update phase, potentially indicating incomplete service information
No transparent disclosure of closing costs, fees, or competitive rate ranges
best_for: First-time homebuyers seeking simplified pre-qualification and rate comparison
Homeowners interested in refinancing who want rate drop alerts and 24/7 support
Borrowers in the 49 licensed states preferring personalized loan officer guidance
Rate-conscious consumers wanting to monitor and compare mortgage rates without credit impact
diagnosis: GoRascal is best for borrowers across 49 states seeking a streamlined mortgage application with rate transparency, personalized support, and rate monitoring tools—particularly those valuing 24/7 accessibility and simple upfront processes. The main caveat is that final rates and terms depend heavily on individual creditworthiness and approval, and the website lacks specific disclosure about loan product types, fees, and competitive positioning on actual rates.
services: Free mortgage rate quotes with no credit impact
Pre-qualification assessment to determine borrowing capacity
Rate comparison shopping across loan products
Rate alert subscription service for rate drop notifications
Rate lock-in services to secure fixed interest rates
Loan underwriting review and approval decision
Dedicated loan officer assignment and guidance
